title: Atlas entry: orbital sander
context: Open, structured reference so anyone can learn to use a orbital sander safely. Original text + original/openly-licensed diagram only (record provenance). Power tool / injury risk — lead with hazards and PPE; requires a safety reviewer.

acceptanceCriteria: Entry covers purpose, when-to-use, step-by-step safe technique, common mistakes, care
